events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, Memorial Day through Labor Day
events.summary: Seasonal open-air market with local produce, baked goods, flowers & artisan foods one block from the beach. Runs weekly through Labor Day.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Half Marathon
events.venue: Morro Rock to Cayucos Pier (finish at Cayucos Pier)
events.summary: 56th annual beach run on hard-packed sand: 6-mile Fun Run finishes at Cayucos Pier; half marathon out-and-back. All ages welcome. 8am start.

events.title: ECOSLO Cayucos Beach Cleanup — August
events.organizer: ECOSLO (Environmental Center of San Luis Obispo)
events.summary: Volunteer litter cleanup at Cayucos Beach pier area. Gloves, bags & supplies provided by ECOSLO. Family-friendly community stewardship event.

events.title: Cayucos Lioness Annual Home Tour
events.summary: Self-guided ticketed tour of distinctive Cayucos homes, a popular Lioness Club fundraiser supporting local community programs.

events.title: ECOSLO Cayucos Beach Cleanup — September
events.organizer: ECOSLO (Environmental Center of San Luis Obispo)
events.summary: Late-summer volunteer beach cleanup near the Cayucos Pier. ECOSLO supplies gloves, grabbers & snacks. Help keep the coast pristine.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic and vintage cars fill downtown Cayucos for this rain-or-shine annual show. Live band, beer garden, and Lions Club BBQ included.
